top.title: Iran ceasefire deal gives Trump a way out of war - but at a high cost
top.summary: The path to the two-week ceasefire with Iran may have fundamentally altered the way the rest of the world views the US.

top.title: What we know about the two-week ceasefire between the US and Iran
top.summary: The provisional truce comes more than a month after the US and Israel launched coordinated attacks on Iran.

top.title: Israel carries out large wave of air strikes across Lebanon
top.summary: Attacks hit the southern suburbs of Beirut, southern Lebanon and the eastern Bekaa Valley hours after a US-Iran ceasefire was announced.

top.title: Brit says he is not elusive Bitcoin creator named by New York Times
top.summary: The British computer scientist and entrepreneur has denied being the man who the New York Times identified at Satoshi Nakamoto.

top.title: Ex-Meta worker investigated for downloading 30,000 private Facebook photos
top.summary: The former employee was fired from Meta after being suspected of downloading 30,000 photos, the company said.

top.title: OpenAI encourages firms to trial four-day weeks to adapt to AI era
top.summary: The ChatGPT-maker said its early policy ideas aim to prompt discussions about action needed as AI systems become more capable.
